{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Gate of Heaven elixir
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Gate of Heaven elixir]] is a volatile elixir that smooths the road from [[Underlord]] to [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Gate of Heaven elixir]] is a living ball of liquid silver energy used for advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
